  1. uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines
Provides the next-generation surgical precision engine for line-based text mutations.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines used by uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
    Class
    Description
    TextResourceLineEdits
    The next-generation surgical line editor for AGI.

    Class
    Description
    TextResourceLineEdits
    The next-generation surgical line editor for AGI.
  • Classes in uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines used by uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources.text.lines
    Class
    Description
    AbstractLineEdit
    Base class for all surgical line-based edits.
    LineDeletion
    A safety-first deletion operation that removes a contiguous range of lines.
    LineInsertion
    A pure insertion operation that places new content before a specified line.
    LineReplacement
    VISUAL TARGET REPLACEMENT: Replaces a range of lines with new content.
